enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Ambikapathy?

The music was composed by the renowned composer A.R. Rahman.

Which movie features the song Ambikapathy?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Ambikapathy, released in 2013.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Ambikapathy?

The lead roles in the movie were portrayed by Dhanush and Sonam Kapoor.

What is the theme of the song Ambikapathy?

The song beautifully expresses themes of love and emotional connection.

Who penned the lyrics for the song Ambikapathy?

The lyrics were written by the acclaimed lyricist Vairamuthu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ambikapathy from the 2013 Tamil movie Ambikapathy, starring Dhanush and Sonam Kapoor, is a melodious track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman, the song features heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and the soulful voice of Naresh Iyer. It portrays the emotions of the characters, reflecting their deep connection and the beauty of their relationship. This song remains a cherished piece in Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ambikapathy, a soulful melody from the movie Ambikapathy, captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman, with heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and the melodious voice of Naresh Iyer, this song resonates deeply with its listeners. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema's musical brilliance through this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: In the river Ganges, there is a colorful bird that has come to the shore, that bird has come to the shore, like a divine wonder.
In the river Ganges, there is a colorful bird that has come to the shore, that bird has come to the shore, its eyes are like a divine wonder.
Look at her, she is the one, listen to her, I am Ambikapathy, who is Amaraavathy? I am Ambikapathy, who is Amaraavathy? Oh, who is Amaraavathy?
In the river Ganges, there is a colorful bird that has come to the shore, that bird has come to the shore, its eyes are like a divine wonder.
My heart beats for you, and your heart beats for me, every day it longs for you, our hearts are calling out to each other.
I think of myself as a poet, feeling proud of it, when I see your beauty, it makes me feel like I am losing myself.
In the city of Pasumpon, I am begging with one eye closed.
Look at her, she is the one, listen to her, oh Amaraavathy, listen? Oh Amaraavathy, listen?
Crossing many worlds, the heart flows out through the eyes, to connect with the small flowers, just one arrow is enough for you.
Thinking of you, my eyes are filled with thoughts, my body is losing itself, my soul is searching for you, it is getting lost and suffocating.
We have come to this world, searching for another half, you are my half, come on... (In the river Ganges, there is a)
Look at her, she is the one, listen to her, I am Ambikapathy, who is Amaraavathy? I am Ambikapathy, oh, who is Amaraavathy? (In the river Ganges)
